---
title: "CV0 Data Analysis & Genomic Predictions"
author: "Luke LeBar"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output: html_document
---

# CV0 Data Analysis & Genomic Predictions

## Load Packages and Data

```{r}
rm(list=ls())

setwd("C:/Users/lukel/OneDrive/Documents/GitHub/Predictathon/data/CV0")

library(here)
library(BrAPI)
library(purrr)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(tidygeocoder)
library(nasapower)
library(rrBLUP)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggsci)
library(factoextra)
library(cluster)
library(apercu)

Crk_GRM <- read_rds("24Crk_AY2-3_combined_GRM.rds")
SVREC_GRM <- read_rds("25_Big6_SVREC_SVREC_focalAccessions_GRM.rds")
Aurora_GRM <- read_rds("2025_AYT_Aurora_combined_GRM.rds")
DVPWA_GRM <- read_rds("AWY1_DVPWA_2024_combined_GRM.rds")
Cornell_GRM <- read_rds("CornellMaster_2025_McGowan_combined_GRM.rds")
OHRWW_GRM <- read_rds("OHRWW_2025_SPO_combined_GRM.rds")
STP1_GRM <- read_rds("STP1_2025_MCG_combined_GRM.rds")
MANKS_GRM <- read_rds("TCAP_2025_MANKS_combined_GRM.rds")
YT_URB_GRM <- read_rds("YT_Urb_25_focalAccessions_GRM.rds")
yield_raw <- read.csv("allAccessions_yield_raw.csv")
trial_metadata <- read.csv("allTrials_metadata.csv")
env_cov <- read.csv("environmental_covariates.csv")
trial_yields <- read.csv("allTrials_yield_raw.csv")
```

## Data Overlap

```{r}
focal_trials <- c("AWY1_DVPWA_2024", "TCAP_2025_MANKS", "25_Big6_SVREC_SVREC",
                  "OHRWW_2025_SPO", "CornellMaster_2025_McGowan", "24Crk_AY2-3",
                  "2025_AYT_Aurora","YT_Urb_25","STP1_2025_MCG")
wheat <- getBrAPIConnection("T3/WheatCAP")
focal_acc <-
  wheat$wizard("accessions", list(trials=c(focal_trials)), verbose=T)
focal_acc <- as.data.frame(cbind(focal_acc$data$ids, focal_acc$data$names))
colnames(focal_acc)[1] = "acc_id"
colnames(focal_acc)[2] = "acc_name"

acc_summary <- yield_raw %>% group_by(germplasmName, isFocal) %>% 
  summarise(
    n = n()
  )
acc_summary

phenotype_lines <- unique(yield_raw$germplasmName)
genotyped_lines <- c(colnames(Crk_GRM),colnames(SVREC_GRM),colnames(Aurora_GRM),
                     colnames(DVPWA_GRM),colnames(Cornell_GRM),
                     colnames(OHRWW_GRM),colnames(STP1_GRM),colnames(MANKS_GRM),
                     colnames(YT_URB_GRM))
pheno_geno_shared <- intersect(phenotype_lines, genotyped_lines)
all_shared <- intersect(pheno_geno_shared, focal_acc$acc_name)

missing_lines <- focal_acc %>% filter(!(acc_name %in% all_shared))
need_pheno <- focal_acc %>% filter(!(acc_name %in% phenotype_lines))
need_geno <- focal_acc %>% filter(!(acc_name %in% phenotype_lines))
write.csv(need_pheno, "need_phenoData.csv")
write.csv(need_geno, "need_genoData.csv")
```
